html:
Exclusive to:

The Ice Fishing Hole is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be found on a Ice Sheet in the Rough Ocean. Unlike other fishing locations, while fishing with a Sea Fishing Rod at the Ice Fishing Hole, there is simply a 20% chance each second for the player to hook a Deep Bass. On the third fish caught, a Frostjaw spawns.

Trivia

  • The Icefishing Hole was introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Wigfrid & Willow update.

Gallery

  • Map Icon
  • Animation of the Icefishing Hole.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

title: Ice Fishing Hole
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}
{{Object Infobox
|image = Ice Fishing Hole.png
|perk = Can be used to fish in with a [[Sea Fishing Rod]].
|spawns = {{pic|32|Frostjaw}}
|spawnCode = "icefishing_hole"
}}
The '''Ice Fishing Hole''' is a naturally spawning object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can be found on a [[Ice Sheet]] in the [[Ocean/DST#Rough|Rough Ocean]]. Unlike other fishing locations, while fishing with a [[Sea Fishing Rod]] at the Ice Fishing Hole, there is simply a 20% chance each second for the player to hook a [[Deep Bass]]. On the third fish caught, a [[Frostjaw]] spawns.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Icefishing Hole was introduced in the ''[[Skill Spotlight Update#Wigfrid & Willow|Skill Spotlight: Wigfrid & Willow]]'' update.
